name: Hash-Brown Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the hash browns between paper towels to remove moisture. Press them into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate to form a crust.
2. Drizzle the melted butter over the crust. Bake in a 425 degree oven for 25 minutes. Remove from the oven. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees.
3. Toss together the ham and cheese, and place them in the crust. Beat the cream with the eggs and seasoned salt. Pour over the ham and cheese.
4. Bake, uncovered, in a 350 degree oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving. Makes 6 servings.
